tagline: Run an agent with any model
description: A configurable AI agent: pick the model via input, give it a system prompt, and attach tools as plugins. The engine runs the full tool-calling loop. Use it as a flow node or attach it to another LLM as a sub-agent tool.

inputs.name: system_prompt
inputs.description: System prompt that defines the agent's behavior

inputs.name: model
inputs.description: OpenRouter chat model id (e.g. openai/gpt-4.1-nano, anthropic/claude-opus-4.5, google/gemini-3-pro). Wire this from a flow input to swap models externally.

inputs.name: tools
inputs.description: Tools the agent may call. Plugins attached to this node are added automatically by the engine.

outputs.name: conversation
outputs.description: An array of messages including any tool call & response messages as well as the final generated output.

outputs.name: content
outputs.description: The content portion of the final generated response message.

outputs.name: tool_calls
outputs.description: Tool calls made by the model

outputs.name: cost_total
outputs.description: Total cost (USD), reported by OpenRouter usage accounting for the chosen model.
